=: Equality — both sides have the same value
-: Subtraction — find the difference between two quantities
^: Exponent — multiply the base by itself that many times
\\sqrt: Square root — the number that, when squared, gives this value
π: Pi — the ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter (≈ 3.14159)
log: Logarithm — the exponent needed to produce a given number from a given base
±: Plus or minus — indicates two possible values
(: Open parenthesis — groups an expression to be evaluated first
): Close parenthesis — ends a grouped expression
